title: Product Lifecycle Analysis
subtitle: Market share progression through four strategic phases

compositionDecision.rationale: The spec contains ordered lifecycle phases with numeric market share values.

alternatives.reason: Could render as linear prose if the curve is not desired.

summary: By adjusting strategy at each phase, the product achieved a 40% peak market share before a managed decline, laying groundwork for a renewal cycle.

items.label: Introduction
items.text: Initial market entry with niche positioning and limited distribution.

items.label: Growth
items.text: Increase marketing investment to capture market share.

items.label: Maturity
items.text: Optimize cost structure and defend market position.

items.label: Decline
items.text: Launch upgraded products to seed the next cycle.
